action.reasoning: Observation: Environment works correctly. No eval_config.json in /data (only dataset_info.json). Analysis: Need to build training pipeline from scratch. Will train per-task PPO models. Decision: Start with a quick baseline - train PPO on walk task for 50k steps, create predict.py, submit eval to measure time and get baseline score.
